mapper.select: SELECT DIET_SEQ, DIET_NAME, DIET_CALORIES FROM DIET ORDER BY DIET_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DIET( DIET_SEQ, DIET_NAME, FOOD_NAME, FOOD_NUMBER, DIET_CALORIES) -- USER_ID,REG_ID, REG_DT, CHG_ID, CHG_DT) VALUES ( (SELECT NULLIF (MAX(A.DIET_SEQ),0)+1 FROM DIET A), #{diet_name}, #{food_name}, #{food_number}, #{diet_calories}) -- #{user_id}, 0, #{user_id}, SYSDATE(), #{user_id}, SYSDATE())
